Tests if `Number.NaN` is recognized as `NaN` using an assertion.

# Purpose
This code is a simple test script that uses the `assert` function to verify that `Number.NaN` is indeed `NaN`. The `isNaN` function checks if the value passed to it is `NaN`, and the `assert` function ensures that this condition is true. This script provides narrow functionality, focusing on a single assertion to confirm the behavior of the `Number.NaN` constant in JavaScript.
